sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84100" key="poa/strion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πο-άστριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n84100.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sickle for cutting grass,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.184</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόδ</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ποτί.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
